title: platycentrum multangulum
intro: Platycentrum multangulum, also known as Three-angled Platycentrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Platycentrum multangulum is typically prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal use, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations.
